memory.summary: My plan to finish the assignment first is dead; I can't ignore the group going out for lunch. We're eating together now.

desires: Stay fully present with my friends right now; I can't handle the guilt of splitting time between them and the assignment.
Feel validated that my team trusts me enough to let me skip work for lunch, even if it means the deadline gets tight later.
Push off the remaining analysis until after dinner so I don't ruin the vibe of our group hangout.

goals.description: Join cohort_3 for lunch immediately; prioritize the group hangout over finishing the assignment analysis.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) outweighs academic tasks (0.15). I feel guilty about splitting time, so staying present with friends is non-negotiable right now.

goals.description: Push the remaining assignment analysis to after dinner to avoid ruining the lunch vibe.
goals.rationale: I'm impulsive and discount future consequences; the deadline isn't until 18:00, so I'll deal with it later when the social pressure drops.

agent.last_reasoning: Going to lunch honors my top affiliation value (0.5) and stops the guilt festering. The deadline is loose enough; I'll tackle the analysis after dinner when social pressure drops.
